title: Object Types, Interfaces, Aliases, and Structural Compatibility · Inference Brief: Object Property Modifiers
summary: Design public service records that evolve without silently accepting misspelled, mutable, or incompatible fields. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts object property modifiers increment in an evolvable service-record contract library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model required, optional, readonly, indexed, and exact-optional property behavior under strict configuration.
Use assertion functions only when failure behavior and the asserted runtime evidence are explicit.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
